63:
Hmm... The blade represents conclusive proof of Gosetsu's survival. I suppose this <Emphasis>could</Emphasis> be considered a necessary cost in securing his safe return...
Yet it is not a decision I can make alone─least of all when our nation has scarce begun to rebuild.
